name: VARONIS SYSTEMS INC
business: Varonis is a data security company focused on protecting what matters most to organizations: their data. Its platform covers cloud, SaaS, and on-premises data stores, and it sells to organizations of all sizes, with a focus on larger enterprises across industries such as financial services, healthcare, technology, and more.

exposures.sentence: Varonis is a data security company focused on protecting what matters most to organizations: their data.
We have further expanded the platform’s capabilities with the introduction of Athena AI, a generative AI layer designed to enhance security operations rather than replace human judgement.

Our platform has expanded from an initial focus on Windows files shares to cover a broad range of mission-critical cloud and on-premises data stores, cloud infrastructure environments, identity repositories, and key SaaS and AI applications.

catalysts.sentence: As part of our strategic transition to SaaS, we have announced the end-of-life of our self-hosted products as of December 31, 2026.

catalysts.event: Expiration of October 2025 share repurchase program
catalysts.sentence: At December 31, 2025, we had $135.0 million of capacity remaining under our October 2025 Share Repurchase Program which will expire in October 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Data will grow at a CAGR of 25.4% to reach 527 zettabytes by 2029.
tamClaims.sentence: The International Data Corporation’s Global DataSphere Forecast, 2025-2029, predicts that over the next five years, data will grow at a compound annual growth rate of 25.4% to reach more than 527 zettabytes (or 527 trillion Gigabytes) by 2029.
